rows.text: ESM-2 learns substantial structural information from sequence alone at scale; contact maps emerge from attention at 15B parameters
Nucleotide Transformer attention maps reveal model learns to focus on biologically meaningful regions (enhancers, promoters) without explicit supervision

Structure-conditioned attention works: AlphaFold 2 demonstrated that conditioning attention on 3D coordinates (IPA) or pairwise structural features (Evoformer pair bias) dramatically improves protein structure prediction
Structure-conditioned attention works: IPA and Evoformer pair bias dramatically improve protein structure prediction
No protein PLM has adopted additive attention bias to inject continuous 3D distance; attention bias is the unexplored strategy between tokenization and GNN approaches
No protein PLM has adopted additive attention bias for injecting continuous 3D distance; this is a gap our project targets
